metric_001.title: Percentage of Issues Not Responded Within One Cycle
metric_001.desc: The percentage of newly created Issues in the current cycle that have not been responded to within one cycle, excluding bots and creator comments

metric_002.title: Issue First Response Time
metric_002.desc: First response time for newly created Issues within the cycle, excluding bots and creator comments

metric_003.title: Issue Processing Duration
metric_003.desc: Average Issue processing duration (days), including closed Issues and unresolved Issues

metric_004.title: Percentage of PRs Not Responded Within One Cycle
metric_004.desc: The percentage of newly created PRs in the current cycle that have not been responded to within one cycle

metric_005.title: PR First Response Time
metric_005.desc: First response time for newly created PRs within the cycle, excluding bots and creator comments

metric_006.title: PR Processing Duration
metric_006.desc: Average duration from PR creation to merge or close

metric_007.title: Code Submission via PR Ratio
metric_007.desc: The percentage of code submitted via PR within the cycle

metric_008.title: PR Linked to Issue Ratio
metric_008.desc: The percentage of PRs linked to Issues within the cycle

metric_009.title: Review Collaboration Ratio
metric_009.desc: The percentage of PRs with at least one non-author Review comment or Approval record within the cycle

metric_010.title: Merge Collaboration Ratio
metric_010.desc: The percentage of PRs where the merger is different from the PR author within the cycle

metric_011.title: PR Comment Frequency
metric_011.desc: Average number of comments/conversations per PR

metric_012.title: Review Time by Pull Request Size
metric_012.desc: Average review time grouped by code change lines (XS/S/M/L/XL)

metric_013.title: Community Contributor Count
metric_013.desc: Number of unique users with any contribution behavior within the cycle

metric_014.title: Code Contributor Count
metric_014.desc: Number of unique users with code commits, PR merges, or PR comments within the cycle

metric_015.title: Non-Code Contributor Count
metric_015.desc: Number of users who only participated in discussions without submitting code within the cycle

metric_016.title: Code Commit Count
metric_016.desc: Total number of new Commits within the cycle

metric_017.title: Lines of Code Added
metric_017.desc: Total code line changes within the cycle

metric_018.title: PR Comment Count
metric_018.desc: Total number of comments under all Issues and PRs within the cycle

metric_019.title: Issue Creation Count
metric_019.desc: Total number of Issues created within the cycle

metric_020.title: Issue Comment Count
metric_020.desc: Total number of comments under Issues within the cycle

metric_021.title: Version Iteration Count
metric_021.desc: Number of Releases published within the cycle

metric_022.title: Stars
metric_022.desc: Number of new Stars within the cycle

metric_023.title: Forks
metric_023.desc: Number of new Forks within the cycle

metric_024.title: Social Media Mentions
metric_024.desc: Mentions on social media platforms such as Twitter/X, Reddit, Hacker News, etc.

metric_025.title: GitHub Mentions
metric_025.desc: Mentions of the project repository in Issues, PRs, and README files on GitHub among TOP 500k projects

metric_026.title: Media Coverage
metric_026.desc: Number of times the project is mentioned in online news media, blogs, and tech media

metric_027.title: Search Query Volume
metric_027.desc: Query volume for the project in search engines

metric_028.title: Commercial Organization Count
metric_028.desc: Number of unique commercial companies identified through contributor email domains or user profiles within the cycle

metric_029.title: Commercial Organization Contributor Count
metric_029.desc: Number of active developers affiliated with commercial organizations (non-personal email) within the cycle

metric_030.title: Research Institution Count
metric_030.desc: Number of research institution organizations participating in contributions within the cycle

metric_031.title: Research Institution Developer Count
metric_031.desc: Number of contributors from research institution organizations participating in code contributions within the cycle

metric_032.title: Individual Core Contributor Count
metric_032.desc: Individual contributors whose code contributions exceed 50% of their total contributions are core contributors, those below 50% are regular contributors

metric_033.title: Commercial Organization Ecosystem Influence
metric_033.desc: Influence of contributing commercial organizations in the ecosystem

metric_034.title: Research Institution Ecosystem Influence
metric_034.desc: Influence of contributing research institutions in the ecosystem

metric_035.title: Individual Contributor Ecosystem Influence
metric_035.desc: Influence of contributing individual contributors in the ecosystem

metric_036.title: Software Package Downloads
metric_036.desc: Number of open source software downloads

metric_037.title: Open Source Software Adoption
metric_037.desc: Number of references by other open source projects (TOP 500k)

metric_038.title: Commercial Software Adoption
metric_038.desc: Number of mainstream commercial products/services based on this project

metric_040.title: Organization Count
metric_040.desc: Number of organizations participating in contributions within the cycle

metric_041.title: Organization Code Contributors
metric_041.desc: Number of organization contributors participating in code contributions within the cycle

metric_042.title: Organization Code Contributor Ratio
metric_042.desc: Ratio of organization contributors participating in code contributions to total code contributors within the cycle

metric_043.title: Organization Code Contribution Volume
metric_043.desc: Lines of code contributed by organizations within the cycle

metric_044.title: Organization Code Contribution Ratio
metric_044.desc: Ratio of code contributed by organizations to total code within the cycle

metric_045.title: Organization Non-Code Contributors
metric_045.desc: Number of organization contributors participating in non-code contributions within the cycle

metric_046.title: Organization Non-Code Contributor Ratio
metric_046.desc: Ratio of organization non-code contributors to total non-code contributors within the cycle

metric_047.title: Organization Non-Code Contribution Volume
metric_047.desc: Non-code contribution volume by organizations within the cycle

metric_048.title: Organization Non-Code Contribution Ratio
metric_048.desc: Ratio of organization non-code contributions to total non-code contributions within the cycle

metric_049.title: Organizations Participating in Governance
metric_049.desc: Number of unique organizations from non-founding organizations in community governance roles within the cycle

metric_050.title: Organization Manager Count
metric_050.desc: Number of unique managers from non-founding organizations in community governance roles within the cycle

metric_051.title: Organization Manager Ratio
metric_051.desc: Ratio of managers from organizations (non-individual) in community governance roles to total managers within the cycle

metric_052.title: Individual Code Contributors
metric_052.desc: Number of individual (non-organizational) contributors with code contribution behavior (such as code commits, PRs) within the cycle

metric_053.title: Individual Code Contributor Ratio
metric_053.desc: Ratio of individual code contributors to total code contributors within the cycle

metric_054.title: Individual Code Contribution Volume
metric_054.desc: Lines of code submitted by individual contributors within the cycle

metric_055.title: Individual Code Contribution Ratio
metric_055.desc: Ratio of code lines contributed by individuals to total code contribution lines within the cycle

metric_056.title: Individual Non-Code Contributors
metric_056.desc: Number of individual (non-organizational) contributors who only participated in non-code contribution behaviors (such as Issue/PR comments, documentation) within the cycle

metric_057.title: Individual Non-Code Contributor Ratio
metric_057.desc: Ratio of individual non-code contributors to total non-code contributors within the cycle

metric_058.title: Individual Non-Code Contribution Volume
metric_058.desc: Total non-code contributions submitted by individual contributors within the cycle (such as Issue/PR comment count)

metric_059.title: Individual Non-Code Contribution Ratio
metric_059.desc: Ratio of individual non-code contributions to total non-code contributions within the cycle

metric_060.title: Individual Manager Count
metric_060.desc: Number of unique individual managers in community governance roles within the cycle

metric_061.title: Individual Manager Ratio
metric_061.desc: Ratio of individual managers in community governance roles to total managers within the cycle

model_011.title: Developer Profiling
model_011.desc: Profiles developers from the perspectives of background, skills, and participation intent based on public metadata and contribution behavior

model_012.title: Developer Attraction
model_012.desc: Measures the community's ability to attract new organizational and individual contributors in the current cycle

metric_065.title: New Organization Count
metric_065.desc: Number of unique organizations that made their first valid contribution (code or Issue) to the community in the current cycle

metric_066.title: New Organizational Code Contributors
metric_066.desc: Number of organizational members who made code contributions for the first time in the current cycle

metric_067.title: New Organizational Non-Code Contributors
metric_067.desc: Number of organizational members who made non-code contributions for the first time in the current cycle

metric_068.title: New Individual Code Contributors
metric_068.desc: Number of individual developers who made code contributions for the first time in the current cycle

metric_069.title: New Individual Non-Code Contributors
metric_069.desc: Number of individual developers who made non-code contributions for the first time in the current cycle

model_013.title: Developer Participation Tiers
model_013.desc: Classifies contributors into core, regular, and visitor tiers across organizational or individual and code or Issue dimensions

metric_070.title: Organizational Core Code Contributors and Managers
metric_070.desc: Number of organizational contributors whose code contribution share exceeds 50% in the current cycle

metric_071.title: Organizational Core Issue Contributors and Managers
metric_071.desc: Number of organizational members ranked in the top 50% by Issue activity in the current cycle

metric_072.title: Organizational Regular Code Contributors
metric_072.desc: Number of organizational members with sustained code contributions but below the core threshold in the current cycle (20%-50% contribution share)

metric_073.title: Organizational Regular Issue Contributors
metric_073.desc: Number of organizational members with sustained Issue participation but below the core threshold in the current cycle

metric_074.title: Organizational Visitor Code Contributors
metric_074.desc: Number of organizational members with occasional or one-off code contributions in the current cycle (below 20% contribution share)

metric_075.title: Organizational Visitor Issue Contributors
metric_075.desc: Number of organizational members with occasional Issue participation in the current cycle

metric_076.title: Individual Core Code Contributors and Managers
metric_076.desc: Number of individual developers ranked in the top 50% by code contribution in the current cycle

metric_077.title: Individual Core Issue Contributors and Managers
metric_077.desc: Number of individual developers ranked in the top 50% by Issue activity in the current cycle

metric_078.title: Individual Regular Code Contributors
metric_078.desc: Number of individual developers in the middle tier of code contribution in the current cycle

metric_079.title: Individual Regular Issue Contributors
metric_079.desc: Number of individual developers in the middle tier of Issue contribution in the current cycle (20%-50%)

metric_080.title: Individual Visitor Code Contributors
metric_080.desc: Number of individual developers with low-frequency or one-off code contributions in the current cycle (below 20%)

metric_081.title: Individual Visitor Issue Contributors
metric_081.desc: Number of individual developers with low-frequency or one-off Issue contributions in the current cycle (below 20%)

model_014.title: Developer Promotions
model_014.desc: Measures how many contributors moved from regular or visitor tiers into the core tier between cycles

metric_082.title: Promotions to Organizational Core Code Contributors and Managers
metric_082.desc: Number of organizational members who were non-core in the previous cycle and became core code contributors in the current cycle

metric_083.title: Promotions to Organizational Core Issue Contributors and Managers
metric_083.desc: Number of organizational members who were non-core in the previous cycle and became core Issue contributors in the current cycle

metric_084.title: Promotions to Individual Core Code Contributors and Managers
metric_084.desc: Number of individual developers who were non-core in the previous cycle and became core code contributors in the current cycle

metric_085.title: Promotions to Individual Core Issue Contributors and Managers
metric_085.desc: Number of individual developers who were non-core in the previous cycle and became core Issue contributors in the current cycle

model_015.title: Core Developer Retention Rate
model_015.desc: Measures the proportion of core developers from the previous cycle who remained core in the current cycle

metric_086.title: Retention Rate of Organizational Core Code Contributors and Managers
metric_086.desc: Proportion of organizational core code contributors from the previous cycle who remained core code contributors in the current cycle

metric_087.title: Retention Rate of Organizational Core Issue Contributors and Managers
metric_087.desc: Proportion of organizational core Issue contributors from the previous cycle who remained core Issue contributors in the current cycle

metric_088.title: Retention Rate of Individual Core Code Contributors and Managers
metric_088.desc: Proportion of individual core code contributors from the previous cycle who remained core code contributors in the current cycle

metric_089.title: Retention Rate of Individual Core Issue Contributors and Managers
metric_089.desc: Proportion of individual core Issue contributors from the previous cycle who remained core Issue contributors in the current cycle

model_016.title: Core Developer Step-Down Rate
model_016.desc: Measures the proportion of core developers from the previous cycle who fell back to regular or visitor status in the current cycle

metric_090.title: Step-Down Rate of Organizational Core Code Contributors and Managers
metric_090.desc: Proportion of organizational core code contributors from the previous cycle who dropped to regular or visitor status in the current cycle

metric_091.title: Step-Down Rate of Organizational Core Issue Contributors and Managers
metric_091.desc: Proportion of organizational core Issue contributors from the previous cycle who dropped to regular or visitor status in the current cycle

metric_092.title: Step-Down Rate of Individual Core Code Contributors and Managers
metric_092.desc: Proportion of individual core code contributors from the previous cycle who dropped to regular or visitor status in the current cycle

metric_093.title: Step-Down Rate of Individual Core Issue Contributors and Managers
metric_093.desc: Proportion of individual core Issue contributors from the previous cycle who dropped to regular or visitor status in the current cycle

model_017.title: Core Developer Attrition Rate
model_017.desc: Measures the proportion of core developers from the previous cycle who had no contribution activity in the current cycle

metric_094.title: Attrition Rate of Organizational Core Code Contributors and Managers
metric_094.desc: Proportion of organizational core code contributors from the previous cycle who had no contribution activity in the current cycle

metric_095.title: Attrition Rate of Organizational Core Issue Contributors and Managers
metric_095.desc: Proportion of organizational core Issue contributors from the previous cycle who had no interaction activity in the current cycle

metric_096.title: Attrition Rate of Individual Core Code Contributors and Managers
metric_096.desc: Proportion of individual core code contributors from the previous cycle who had no contribution activity in the current cycle

metric_097.title: Attrition Rate of Individual Core Issue Contributors and Managers
metric_097.desc: Proportion of individual core Issue contributors from the previous cycle who had no interaction activity in the current cycle

metric_098.title: License Header & Copyright Notice
metric_098.desc: Checks whether all source code files contain compliant License Header and Copyright text

metric_099.title: License Inclusion
metric_099.desc: Checks if a LICENSE file exists in the repository root directory and whether it is an OSI-approved open source license

metric_100.title: License Compatibility
metric_100.desc: Detects whether third-party dependency licenses conflict with the project's declared main license

metric_101.title: License & Copyright Anti-Tampering
metric_101.desc: Checks whether imported code snippets fully retain the original upstream License and Copyright information

metric_102.title: Vulnerability Response & Disclosure
metric_102.desc: Assesses whether the project has established a public vulnerability reporting channel and fix response mechanism

metric_103.title: Security Vulnerabilities
metric_103.desc: Scans the project code and dependencies for publicly disclosed and unpatched CVE vulnerabilities

metric_104.title: README
metric_104.desc: Checks whether the repository contains a README document that clearly describes the project's functionality

metric_105.title: Build Documentation
metric_105.desc: Checks whether documentation is provided to guide users on building/installing the project from source

metric_106.title: API Documentation
metric_106.desc: Checks whether clear API interface definition documentation or specification files are provided

metric_107.title: Committers File
metric_107.desc: Checks whether a public list of core contributors with decision-making authority is maintained in the repository

metric_108.title: Dependency Accessibility
metric_108.desc: Verifies that all third-party libraries the project depends on are publicly accessible and downloadable

metric_109.title: Code Review Mechanism
metric_109.desc: Measures the proportion of code merged to the main branch that has undergone Pull Request peer review

metric_110.title: Snippet Reference
metric_110.desc: Identifies imported external code snippets and verifies the compliance of their source declarations

metric_111.title: DCO
metric_111.desc: Checks whether all code commits include a Developer Certificate of Origin (Signed-off-by)

metric_112.title: Snippet Reference
metric_112.desc: Identifies imported external code snippets and verifies the compliance of their source declarations

metric_113.title: Patent Risk
metric_113.desc: Analyzes whether introduced software has known patent infringement risks (based on OIN list)

metric_114.title: Test Coverage
metric_114.desc: Measures the proportion of code lines covered by automated test cases to total code lines

metric_115.title: Buildable
metric_115.desc: Verifies whether the project can be successfully built from source into a working system using publicly available tools

metric_116.title: CI Integration
metric_116.desc: Checks whether the project has configured and enabled an automated continuous integration pipeline

metric_117.title: Build Metadata Availability
metric_117.desc: Checks whether build process input metadata (environment, version, etc.) is saved and provided

metric_118.title: Reproducible Build
metric_118.desc: Verifies whether the same source code produces binary packages with identical hash values in the same environment

metric_119.title: SBOM Check
metric_119.desc: Verifies whether the released software version includes a standard Software Bill of Materials (SPDX/CycloneDX format)

metric_120.title: Binary Artifact Inclusion
metric_120.desc: Checks whether the source code repository illegally contains compiled binary files

metric_121.title: Package Signature
metric_121.desc: Verifies whether the released software package has been digitally signed to ensure integrity and anti-tampering

metric_122.title: Release Notes
metric_122.desc: Checks whether clear changelog documentation is provided at version release

metric_123.title: Lifecycle Statement
metric_123.desc: Checks whether the maintenance lifecycle and End-of-Life (EOL) policy for software versions are explicitly declared

metric_124.title: Vulnerability Fix Time
metric_124.desc: Measures the average time from vulnerability report to fix code merge

metric_062.title: Contributor Statistics
metric_062.desc: Display contributor details, including contributor count, top contributor, contributing organization count, top contributing organization, as well as each contributor's role persona, milestone persona, domain persona, organization affiliation and contribution volume

metric_063.title: Issue Management
metric_063.desc: Display Issue management details, including new Issue count, Issue resolution rate, unresponded Issue count, average comment count, as well as each Issue's status, processing duration, comment count and other information

metric_064.title: PR Management
metric_064.desc: Display PR management details, including new PR count, PR resolution rate, unresponded PR count, code commit count, as well as each PR's status, processing duration, reviewers and other information
